'''Boon Soniita III''' was a [[Daggerstar|swoop racer]] during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was the grandson of swoop racing legend [[Boon Soniita]]. Boon Soniita III was seriously injured during races at least twice in his career.
